plugins.name: audit-dashboard
plugins.description: Generates a rich, interactive HTML dashboard from Treasure Data audit log data — event volumes, top users, event types, denied access, IP addresses, resource types, and hourly patterns.

plugins.name: pipeline-dashboard
plugins.description: Generates an interactive HTML monitoring dashboard for data pipelines — workflow status, job logs, audit trail, KPI cards, trend charts, live log viewer, and event timeline.
